description: The BMW M6, produced across three generations from 1983 to 2018, was BMW's flagship performance coupe. The original E24 with its motorsport-derived 3.5-litre straight-six was a Group A homologation special. The E63 introduced a 5.0-litre V10, and the F06/F12/F13 used a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 producing up to 600 bhp.
